description: This was in standard and I was sus from the start because he (Severed21) is level 81 and is a top 1000 champ with a 2kd and an 80% win rate. On the first round, this happens where he shoots his teammate then flicks back to me and when I slowed it down, which you see in the second clip, he scopes in on me then in an instant his crosshair flicks to his teammate then back to me. IN the third clip which i slowed down the same instant flick happens but along with that maybe I'm coping but it doesn't even look like he aims on me it looks like he is shooting the window sill the whole time. However, in the 3rd clip after he head shots me as my body is falling his crosshairs insta locks on my falling deadbodys head. Furthermore, looking into his stats you can see he has played with what i counted as 7 already banned cheaters so even if this is not enough to ban for cheating that must count for something no? Thank you for your time
